title_es: Kimchi: El Cambio de Juego para la Salud Intestinal
hook_en: Did you know this spicy dish can boost your gut health?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que este plato picante puede mejorar tu salud intestinal?
key_message: Kimchi is packed with live probiotics that can improve gut microbiome diversity.
visual_elements: Close-up of a jar of kimchi
Zoom in on ingredient list showing 'fermented'
Her taking a bite with an exaggerated 'yummy' expression
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Fermented Foods (Kimchi, Sauerkraut) — Contain live probiotics that support gut microbiome diversity (Tip: Buy refrigerated versions (not shelf-stable) — pasteurization kills live cultures)

title_es: Chucrut: Más Allá del Perro Caliente
hook_en: You won't believe what sauerkraut can do for your health!
hook_es: ¡No vas a creer lo que el chucrut puede hacer por tu salud!
key_message: Sauerkraut's live probiotics help support a healthy gut microbiome.
visual_elements: Bowl of sauerkraut with vibrant color
Mixing sauerkraut into a salad with a happy dance
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Fermented Foods (Kimchi, Sauerkraut) — Contain live probiotics that support gut microbiome diversity (Tip: Buy refrigerated versions (not shelf-stable) — pasteurization kills live cultures)
